person.name: Emily Chen

last_seen.activity: Playing near tent while parents prepared lunch
last_seen.direction: Unknown - may have followed trail towards lake

person.clothing: Pink t-shirt with unicorn, blue shorts, white sneakers

witnesses.name: David Chen
witnesses.statement: She was playing by the tent, I looked away for maybe 5 minutes. When I looked back she was gone.

witnesses.name: Camper at site #45
witnesses.statement: Saw a little girl in pink walking towards the lake trail around 12:30.

interview_notes: Child is shy around strangers. Responds to 'Emmy'. Has done some hiking with family but never alone. Parents extremely distressed.
weather_concerns: Clear but getting cold at night
